overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character exploring a neon-lit urban environment. The sequence begins inside a futuristic retail store with teal lighting, exits onto a rainy street filled with holographic advertisements and pedestrians, and concludes by ascending a dark alley ramp between towering buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic retail store with mannequin displays

events.description: character turns toward the store exit doorway
approaching and exiting the store into the outdoor street

agents.ego_description: walking through the retail store in a pink jacket and white hat, passing displays and NPCs while heading toward the exit

notable_agents.action: male NPC in blue jacket standing near the display platform
security guard standing near the back wall

entered.detail: walls and ceiling with distinctive teal cyan lighting throughout the space
white mannequin with glowing pink neon outline on circular display platform
wall-mounted shelves with grid pattern containing various merchandise
red neon sign visible through the storefront window
large archway doorway leading to the outside street

segments.scene_description: The segment takes place inside a futuristic retail store bathed in teal artificial light. The camera follows a character in a pink jacket navigating between illuminated mannequin displays and product shelves. Various NPCs stand throughout the space, and a red neon sign is visible through the front window as the character approaches the exit archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy neon-lit commercial street with reflective wet pavement

events.description: exits the store into the rainy neon-lit street environment
ambient lighting shifts from teal indoor to multicolored neon outdoor reflections on wet ground

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk through crowds of pedestrians in the rain

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white outfit walking along the sidewalk
group of pedestrians crossing the wet street

entered.detail: rain-slicked road surface reflecting multicolored neon lights
multiple bright neon signs including red Japanese characters and pink logos
curved building with large illuminated windows displaying mannequins
floating holographic displays and billboards above the street level

segments.scene_description: The character exits the store into a bustling Night City street at night. The wet asphalt reflects vibrant neon signs in pink, red, and blue hues. Crowds of pedestrians move through the rain-slicked streets, and holographic advertisements float above the road. The camera moves through the dense crowd past a curved building facade with illuminated display windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with prominent holographic dancer advertisement

events.description: camera begins following a different character with green hair and black shirt
approaching a large holographic dancer projection on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking past storefronts and approaching a holographic dancer advertisement, passing pedestrians on the busy sidewalk

notable_agents.action: holographic dancer in blue dress with pink neon outline standing on the sidewalk
pedestrian in green jacket walking ahead on the street

entered.detail: tall vertical red neon signs with Asian characters mounted on building walls
lit shop windows with mannequin displays and pink neon lighting
dark opening leading to a narrow alley with concrete ramp

segments.scene_description: The camera now follows a character with green hair walking along the neon-lit sidewalk. The street features prominent vertical red neon signs with Asian characters. A large holographic dancer in a blue dress stands on the sidewalk as a notable landmark. The character approaches a dark alley entrance on the left while passing various storefront windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark narrow alley with concrete ramp and garbage piles

events.description: turns off the main street into a dark narrow alleyway
lighting becomes significantly darker with only ambient light filtering from above
begins ascending the steep concrete ramp between tall buildings

agents.ego_description: walking up a concrete ramp in a narrow alley, passing piles of garbage bags and metal railings while heading toward the light above

entered.detail: steep sloped concrete walkway with metal edge leading upward between buildings
large pile of trash bags and debris accumulated against the alley wall
rusted metal railings and handrails along the left side of the ramp
metal bridge or walkway connecting the two buildings overhead
tall concrete walls of surrounding buildings creating a narrow canyon effect

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a dark narrow alley, leaving the neon-lit street behind. The environment becomes significantly darker as they ascend a concrete ramp flanked by rusted metal railings and piles of garbage bags. Tall building walls rise on both sides creating an enclosed canyon, with an overhead walkway bridging the gap above. The segment ends as the character continues ascending toward the light visible at the top of the ramp.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sterile, artificial glow of a futuristic retail store into the chaotic neon vibrancy of a rainy city street, finally descending into a dark, industrial alley. It begins inside a store bathed in teal light, following a character in a pink jacket past illuminated mannequins toward a red neon sign at the exit. As the character steps outside, the environment shifts to a bustling urban thoroughfare where wet asphalt reflects pink and blue hues and holographic advertisements float above crowds of pedestrians. The camera then glides along a sidewalk past vertical red signs and a large holographic dancer before turning away from the city lights into a narrow, shadowed passage. Finally, the scene transitions into a dark concrete canyon as the character ascends a ramp flanked by rusted railings and garbage bags, moving toward a distant light at the top.
